title: About me
summary: I build software focused on frontend (React, TypeScript) with solid backend foundations (.NET, SQL Server). I care about clean code, good organization and understanding how things work — not just using them.

highlights.title: What I'm good at
items: Web interfaces with React and TypeScript
Complex business logic in .NET and SQL Server

work.title: What I've built
items: Web and mobile app for inventory management and fleet scheduling
App for managing judicial processes in car dealerships
